ec2_start_requires: runtime lane queue selected lane order=1
model registry coverage result=pass_local_only, selected lane result=pass, failed_check_count=0

runtime_scope_boundary.current_execution_scope: simplified first-proof API lanes exported from validated Plan templates
runtime_scope_boundary.not_yet_active_runtime: the full Wave42/Main Flow graph and the old C:\Comfy_UI workflow system
runtime_scope_boundary.promotion_rule: Main Flow material must be extracted into a concrete lane or module, statically validated, registered, queued, packaged, and pass auth, queue, model-registry, Git, readiness, static-proof, pullback, and QA gates before EC2 execution.

plan.purpose: Project source of truth, trackers, instructions, QA evidence, and certifications.

workflows.purpose: Runtime-facing exported ComfyUI workflow files copied from the validated Plan templates.

models.purpose: Local placement guide for checkpoints, LoRAs, VAEs, ControlNet models, and embeddings. Binaries are ignored.

runtime_artifacts.purpose: Local landing area for run manifests, pullbacks, and review artifacts that are not committed unless explicitly approved.

configs.purpose: Safe-to-commit runtime configuration and handoff notes.
